name: Sun-Dried Tomato Monkey Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 loaves uncooked frozen bread, slightly defrosted
1/2 cup marinated sun-dried tomatoes, drained and chopped
1/2 cup mozzarella cheese, cut into small cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the slightly defrosted bread on a lightly floured surface.
2. Cut each loaf in half lengthwise; then cut each half into 6 pieces (total of 12 pieces).
3. Grease a large bundt pan with melted butter.
4. Dip each piece of bread first in melted butter, then in parmesan cheese.
5. Layer the bread pieces in the prepared bundt pan.
6. Sprinkle each layer with sun-dried tomatoes, chives, and mozzarella cheese, ensuring none of these ingredients are exposed to the surface of the pan to avoid burning.
7. Continue alternating layers until all bread pieces are used, finishing with a layer of bread pieces.
8. Cover the bundt pan with a dry towel and let rise in a warm, draft-free area for 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
9. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
10. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
11. Remove bread from the pan immediately. Makes 1 loaf.
